---
title: Home
---

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/IDPhoto.jpg){width=95% .center-img}

<br>
[Download CV](/yawenliu.github.io/files/CV_2026.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .center-btn}
<!--
    [Research Page](research.html){.btn .btn-secondary}
-->
:::


::: {.column width="60%"}

# Yawen LIU

PhD Candidate in Economics  
Nanyang Technological University

## About Me

I am a PhD candidate in Economics at Nanyang Technological University. My research interests lie in corporate finance, Chinese economy, and capital markets, with a particular focus on regulatory risk, overseas IPO and delisting.

## Research Interests

- Corporate Finance
- International Finance
- Chinese Economy
- Capital Markets

<!--
    ## Working Papers

    **Foregone Growth and Missing IPO: the Effects of a Delisting Risk from the HFCAA**  
    with Guiying Laura WU
-->

:::
:::
